utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property; financing; legal_services; moving_services; setup_services; total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections with content. Now check if each is fully specified: (1) property: includes address, type, bedrooms, size, features, price, taxes, utilities—sufficient details and price. (2) financing: includes mortgage type, loan amount, down payment, interest rate, term, monthly payment, arrangement fee, appraisal fee—sufficient terms. (3) legal_services: includes service type, cost, and features—cost provided. (4) moving_services: includes service, cost, and features—cost provided. (5) setup_services: includes utilities setup and other setup items (survey, inspection, maintenance) with costs—sufficient. (6) total_budget: includes cost breakdown with sums for property price, down payment, closing costs with components, moving and setup, total upfront cost, monthly mortgage, monthly utilities/maintenance, total monthly cost—complete. Therefore, all 6/6 items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final solution includes specific selections across categories that match items in the ground-truth ratings. Map each named item exactly to its corresponding rating: Property: Historic Townhouse; Financing: Traditional Mortgage; Legal Services: Premium Legal Package; Moving Services: Standard Moving; Setup/Utilities: Premium Utilities; Property Survey: Full Structural Survey; Home Inspection maps to the general inspections list as Full Structural Survey already covers it, but since 'Home Inspection' is not a distinct rated item beyond surveys, we only map items that directly match named ratings.

final_package_text:
{
    "property": {
        "address": "142 Parliament Street, Corktown, Toronto",
        "type": "Historic Townhouse",
        "bedrooms": "2-3 bedrooms",
        "size": "180m² (1,940 sq ft)",
        "features": "12m² home office with separate entrance, 50m² basement workshop with 8ft ceilings and 220V electrical, private parking for 2 vehicles",
        "price": "CAD $750,000",
        "property_taxes": "CAD $4,200/year",
        "utilities": "CAD $180/month"
    },
    "financing": {
        "mortgage_type": "Traditional Mortgage Package",
        "loan_amount": "CAD $580,000",
        "down_payment": "CAD $170,000",
        "interest_rate": "5.24% fixed rate",
        "term": "25-year amortization",
        "monthly_payment": "CAD $3,387",
        "arrangement_fee": "CAD $1,200",
        "appraisal_fee": "CAD $400"
    },
    "legal_services": {
        "service": "Premium Legal Package",
        "cost": "CAD $1,200",
        "features": "Priority December closing guaranteed"
    },
    "moving_services": {
        "service": "Standard Moving Service",
        "cost": "CAD $650",
        "features": "Professional movers, packing included, December dates reserved"
    },
    "setup_services": {
        "utilities": "Premium Utilities Package - CAD $280 (gas, electricity, water, internet, phone)",
        "property_survey": "Full Structural Property Survey - CAD $650",
        "home_inspection": "CAD $500",
        "basic_maintenance": "CAD $75/month (reactive repairs)"
    },
    "total_budget": {
        "property_price": "CAD $750,000",
        "down_payment": "CAD $170,000",
        "closing_costs": "CAD $15,050 (legal $1,200 + survey $650 + mortgage arrangement $1,200 + transfer tax $11,500 + inspection $500)",
        "moving_and_setup": "CAD $930 (moving $650 + utilities $280)",
        "total_upfront_cost": "CAD $765,980",
        "monthly_mortgage": "CAD $3,387",
        "monthly_utilities_maintenance": "CAD $255",
        "total_monthly_housing_cost": "CAD $3,642"
    }
}
